title: Three-Year Durability of Automated Insulin Delivery Therapy in Children and Adolescents with Type 1 Diabetes: A Multicenter Real-World Study.
abstract: Evidence on the long-term durability of glycemic control beyond the first year of automated insulin delivery therapy remains limited, particularly in large multicenter pediatric cohorts. The present study aimed to evaluate long-term effectiveness and identify determinants of sustained optimal outcomes over 3 years of MiniMed™ 780G use in youth with type 1 diabetes (T1D).
